contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 15
- Description: Diagnose & fix HEAD /ping 405 on dao_protocol (expense report submission broken)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dao_protocol/pull/114
  
  Details:
  Gary reported that the DAO Inventory Expense Report page (dapp.truesight.me/report_dao_expenses.html) was stuck — submissions were falling into clipboard/share fallback instead of POSTing to Edgar.
  
  Diagnosis: The DApp's isOnline() function sends HEAD /ping to edgar.truesight.me/ping, but the dao_protocol FastAPI server only had a GET handler. FastAPI returned 405 Method Not Allowed for HEAD, causing isOnline() to return false.
  
  Fix: Added HEAD handler to /ping and /healthz endpoints in truesight_dao_client/server/routes/health.py. Merged PR #114 and deployed to the dao_protocol server.
  
  ~15 minutes of joint diagnosis + fix + deploy.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh, Sophia Truesight
- TDG Issued: 0
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
